bta_transaction_c
uvm_sequence_item
bta_transaction_c

Base transaction class for protocol transactions.  Contains address, data, and control fields.

Transaction Fields
m_addr
rand addr_t m_addr

Transaction address

m_data
rand data_t m_data

Transaction data payload

m_write
rand bit m_write

Write enable (1=write, 0=read)

m_valid
bit m_valid

Transaction valid signal

m_timestamp
time m_timestamp

Transaction timestamp in simulation time

Constraints
addr_range_c
constraint addr_range_c {
m_addr 
inside 
{[
32'h1000:32'h1FFF]};
m_addr[1:0]
= 
= 2'b00;
}

Constrains address to valid memory range

data_non_zero_c
constraint data_non_zero_c {
m_data !
 = 
0;
}

Constrains data to non-zero for testing

Methods
new
function new(
string 
name
 = 
"bta_transaction_c"
)

Constructor for transaction object

Parameters
name
string

Object name for UVM factory

do_copy
virtual function void do_copy(
uvm_object 
rhs
)

UVM copy method override

Parameters
rhs
uvm_object

Right-hand side object to copy from

do_compare
virtual function bit do_compare(
uvm_object 
rhs,
uvm_comparer 
comparer
)

UVM compare method override

Parameters
rhs
uvm_object

Right-hand side object to compare with

comparer
uvm_comparer

UVM comparer object

Returns

1 if objects match, 0 otherwise

convert2string
virtual function string convert2string()

Convert transaction to string for printing

Returns

String representation of transaction
